expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers REPORT_STATE enumeration and resume semantics: it lists four REPORT_STATE values and states deterministic routing via user choice applied through `scripts/apply_user_choice.sh`, including `full_regenerate`→phase0, `smart_refresh`→phase2, `reuse/resume`→continue. This directly addresses “REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: result.md scopes the evaluation to Phase 0 (“Evidence-based checks (Phase 0 only)”, “Primary phase under test: phase0”) and cites Phase 0 contract outputs (runtime_setup/request_fulfillment/supporting_issue_request artifacts) as defined in the snapshot. The produced verdict is framed as “PASS (contract-covered in snapshot evidence)” for phase0, aligning the output with the primary phase.
